contract.goal: Verify every `§ <Recipe>` citation in skill bodies resolves to an authored recipe in `docs/SUBSTRATE-COMPOSITIONS.md`, a skill-local section heading, or another conventions doc. Per PLAN.md Phase 1.3: 'Any miss is a blocker — author the body before merging.'
acceptance_criteria: Every unique recipe ref (`§ <Recipe>` without `below` qualifier) resolves to a heading in `docs/SUBSTRATE-COMPOSITIONS.md`.
Every skill-local ref (`§ <Section> below` or `see § <Section>`) resolves to a heading in the same skill body.
Every cross-doc ref (`§ <Section>` qualified by a file name) resolves to a heading in the named file.
rules_applied: AGENT-CONVENTIONS.md § Citation conventions — established in Unit 1.2; this unit verifies the convention is consistent across skill bodies and docs.
PLAN.md Phase 1.3: 'Any miss is a blocker — author the body before merging.'
CLAUDE.md: keep it basic — no scope creep; verification unit only.
disqualifiers: Authoring new recipes not in Unit 1.2's set (recipe set is closed after 1.2).
Graduating the grep cross-check to a CI test (testing-strategy whiteboard recommendation; deferred to a follow-up — outside PLAN scope for 1.3).
Touching any file outside skill bodies' citation strings (cross-check is verification, not authoring).

actions: Ran repo-wide grep for `§` markers across skill bodies. Six files matched: ev-loop-confidence, ev-loop-interactive, ev-run, loom-archive, guild-whiteboard, griot-compact.
Enumerated all citations and classified each as recipe ref / skill-local ref / cross-doc ref / section number.

Built 11-recipe citation inventory: § Append finding, § Capture finding, § Checkin write, § Compose PR, § Derive panel, § Phase update, § Retro write, § Revise PLAN.md, § Save session, § State refresh, § Triage PR comments.
Cross-checked against docs/SUBSTRATE-COMPOSITIONS.md headings: 11 ↔ 11 EXACT MATCH. No dangling citations, no orphan recipes.
Verified skill-local refs: § Substrate compositions, § Panel auto-derivation, § "Contradiction detection (v1: future-work)" — all resolve within their citing skill bodies.

Found one dangling cross-doc ref: skills/loom-archive/SKILL.md:27 cited `§ Retro storage` but docs/LOOM-CONVENTIONS.md has `### retros/<filename>.json` (artifact-path-as-heading pattern). Fixed: updated the cite to `§ retros/<filename>.json` matching the literal heading.
Confirmed section numbers (§ 1 … § 5) in griot-compact are skill-local internal section numbering, not recipe refs — correctly scoped out of the cross-check.
Derived panel via bin/guild derive-panel for the single-file change: evaluator-contract-fit.

Invoked /guild-validate. Verdict: approved with 0 findings. Evaluator made one soft observation (suggested documenting the '§ followed by digit = section number, not recipe' rule somewhere) but did not flag it.

changes_since_previous: Unit 1.2 authored the three docs and updated most references. This unit verifies the cross-reference graph is consistent and patches the one cross-doc cite that didn't match its target heading exactly.
notes_for_pr: Cross-check log (PLAN.md Phase 1.3 verification clause): 11 unique recipe citations across skill bodies, 11 authored recipes in docs/SUBSTRATE-COMPOSITIONS.md, 1:1 EXACT MATCH. Zero dangling citations.
Skill-local refs resolved: § Substrate compositions, § Panel auto-derivation, § "Contradiction detection (v1: future-work)" — all resolve within their own skill body.
One cross-doc cite fix: skills/loom-archive/SKILL.md updated `§ Retro storage` → `§ \`retros/<filename>.json\`` to match the literal heading in docs/LOOM-CONVENTIONS.md.

Considered and deferred: testing-strategy's whiteboard recommendation to graduate the grep cross-check into a CI-enforced test. Out of PLAN scope for 1.3; tracked as a follow-up for a later phase (could land alongside Phase 7's cross-cutting griot writes or as a standalone follow-up).

Soft observation from contract-fit evaluator: future cross-checks might benefit from a documented rule that '§ followed by digit = section number, not recipe' (preventing re-litigation of griot-compact's § 1 … § 5 internal section numbers). Not actioned in this unit; trivial enough to add inline if it surfaces again.

Latent stale cli/lib/project.ts:151 comment reference (`// LOOM-CONVENTIONS.md § Pairing with draft.`) remains; Phase 1.3's grep cross-check operates over skill-body recipe citations, not .ts comments, so the reference is intentionally out of scope here. Phase 2 (which moves draft→loom semantics) is the natural place to address.
